questions.question: What conservation projects or events are currently advertised?
questions.answer:
Two conservation-related events are currently advertised on Irvington Green's website:

1. **Chaos & Catharsis** – A speaker-led series addressing overlapping crises including climate disruption. Upcoming dates: April 17 (Luke Kemp & Douglas Rushkoff), April 22/Earth Day (Samantha Sweetwater, Reverend Billy Talen, Daniel Pinchbeck), and April 25 (Rev Billy & Stop Shopping Choir). Tickets available at chaosandcatharsis.com.

2. **Rivertowns Earth Month Scavenger Hunt** – A family-friendly Earth Month game running throughout April, open to residents from Hastings-on-Hudson to Sleepy Hollow. Participants explore open spaces, complete stewardship missions, and earn points. Registration is open.

Both are listed at irvingtongreen.org.
nextPrompts: Are there any ongoing land stewardship or invasive species removal volunteer events listed under the 'Land' section of irvingtongreen.org?

questions.answer: Not specified in the provided sources.
